name: Microwave Pumpkin Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned or fresh pumpkin, puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all ingredients together in a 4-cup glass measure.
2. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner open for venting.
3. Cook on HIGH power until thick, about 3-5 minutes.
4. Let cool to room temperature before storing covered in the refrigerator.
Makes 1-1/2 cups. This recipe gets 30% or less of its calories from fat and is low in sodium. Great on toast or waffles!
